title: Mawabestiary
body:
Add some little challenge in your world and fight new monsters, these are rarer but more dangerous and get new weapons to fight better !

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1KC5jXwmuns" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

New sword

- Atrocious sword : Poison your enemies at the risk of being caught in a dangerous cloud.

- End contact: Deal heavy damage, with the risk of hurting you.

New useful item

- Slave Gem: Summon a Slave Ghost.

List of bad guys

- Spored Zombie: This poor zombie carries a wart in his flesh that forces him to walk on all fours and spits poison if you hit him. Found in temperate biomes (plains, forests, etc.).

- Thumper: An heavy undead capable of withstanding blows, inflicts low damage for his size, but avoid fighting him on the edge of a cliff. Found in temperate or dry biomes with minimal space to move (plains, savannah, etc.)

- Zombicator: A fallen vindicator who returns as a zombie, deadly, has fast movement but is slow in his attack, slit into a Top Half Zombicator after his death. Found in temperate biomes (plains, forest).

- Top Half Zombicator: Even after having perished in a raid and failing to carry out his revenge beyond death against you, he remains tenacious and it is not is legless situation that will stop him.

- Necrophagous "Iron Brawl": His face is hidden to avoid eating other zombies, slow but his fist is devastating. Found in hot biomes (desert, mesa).

- Snow Rider: He’s nothing without his Undead Polar Bear, this Stray uses it to better track you down. Found in snowy plains.

- Galvanizer: This giant skeleton can smash you, stay away! Defeated, gives his Slave Gem, use it to summon a temporary ally. Found in Soul sand valley (Nether)

Ally

- Slave Ghost: Summoned on a Slave Gem, fights all monsters around it before disappearing.

WIP

- Ice Spitter zombie: The ice block on his back is strange... Not appearing at the moment.
